caption:
NAD+ is one of the most critical molecules in your body. And after age 40, you have roughly half the levels you had at 20.

Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+) is a coenzyme present in every living cell. It powers:

• Cellular energy production (mitochondrial function)
• DNA repair mechanisms
• Sirtuin activation (the "longevity genes")
• Neurotransmitter synthesis
• Circadian rhythm regulation

When NAD+ levels decline, everything slows—energy, recovery, cognitive clarity, and cellular repair.

Our NAD+ IM injections deliver this essential coenzyme directly into the bloodstream, bypassing digestive absorption for maximum bioavailability.

This isn't a vitamin trend. This is cellular restoration backed by peer-reviewed research.

Explore our vitamin injection menu and optimize from the inside out. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Elegant infographic showing NAD+ molecule structure transitioning into a visual of cellular energy pathways. Deep navy and gold palette. Three slides: molecular structure, declining NAD+ graph with age, benefits list with luxury typography.
